ddls:
CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist of the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the album */,
  "pi_owner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project owner */,
  "copyright_info" TEXT /* Copyright information for the album */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Published date of the album */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks in the album */,
  "explicit_content" INTEGER /* Whether the album contains explicit content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_pi_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("pi_owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "debut_year" INTEGER /* Year the artist debuted */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Hometown of the artist */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's image */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country of origin of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the album the track belongs to */,
  "track_title" TEXT /* Title of the track */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the track */,
  "track_number" INTEGER /* Track number within the album */,
  "explicit_content" INTEGER /* Whether the track contains explicit content */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, contributor, viewer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the album */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the album was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "login_location" TEXT /* Location of the user at the time of access */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the owner */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the owner's password */,
  "ownership_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of ownership */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the playlist was last updated */,
  "publicly_accessible" INTEGER /* Whether the playlist is publicly accessible */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist track */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track in the playlist */,
  "addition_date" TEXT /* Date the track was added to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the album */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes for the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the album */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* The rating value given by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "album_genres" (
  "album_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album-genre pair */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_album_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_album_genres_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "album_owners" (
  "album_owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album-owner pair */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_album_owners_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_album_owners_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)
